chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1307 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 12.03.2024 Petitioner Sanaullah Thebo, present in person. Mr. Ferozuddin N. Shaikh, Advocate for respondent No.9. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Muhammad Hayat Shaikh, Project Director SCARP, Khairpur and Abdul Rehman Indher, Assistant Director (Operations), PDMA Sindh, Sukkur..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Comments have been filed by respondent No.8 and on behalf of respondent No.2. Petitioner, who is appearing in person, does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
